meta.title: Furkan Tunalı CV
meta.description: Experienced AI, software and platform engineer architecting scalable, innovative solutions for multi-cloud environments, optimizing developer experience across web development, full-stack. Currently working with AI to reimagine software functionality and create intelligent solutions.

summary: Senior software & AI engineer building scalable full-stack systems, cloud infrastructure, and agentic AI pipelines.

Kubernetes, AWS, GCP, Azure, Docker, Terraform, Nginx, Cloudflare, Grafana, Loki, Prometheus, GitHub Actions, CircleCI, Jenkins, TeamCity
Node.js, TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, Ruby, PHP, NestJS, Express
React, NextJS, Vue.js, Nuxt, HTML, CSS, PostCSS, SCSS, Wireframing

projects.name: Newsify Today
projects.subtitle: AI news platform & ChatGPT App (MCP App)
projects.intro: Agentic AI pipeline curates, scores, and summarizes trending news in real time across worldwide regions and languages.
bullets: LangGraph agent with Ollama (3 nodes) + Gemini fallback; MCP server shipped as ChatGPT App.
projects.stack: TypeScript, Python, NestJS, Next.js, React, LangGraph, LangChain, Ollama, Gemini API, PostgreSQL, Redis, BullMQ, MicroK8s, Docker, Cloudflare Tunnels, Grafana/Loki/Tempo, MCP SDK, Turborepo

subroles.title: Senior AI Solutions Engineer
bullets: Built AI system with OpenAI & Tavily APIs analyzing customer input to auto-identify GDPR vendors, researching hosting locations, DPO emails, and privacy policy links; researched PydanticAI and AutoGen agent frameworks for compliance automation.

subroles.title: Senior Infrastructure Engineer
bullets: Led ECS to Kubernetes (EKS) migration with zero downtime; built Terraform IaC across AWS (Fargate, ECS, ECR, CloudFormation, RDS, EC2, Cloud Map, Route53, Lambda); set up DMARC/domain infra and resolved critical production incidents.

subroles.title: Senior DX and Full-stack Engineer
bullets: Restructured legacy Rails monolith into 25+ microservices monorepo; implemented Docker Compose for fast and reliable development iterations; CI/CD via GitHub Actions & AWS ECR; implemented EventBridge scheduling; resolved urgent incidents; built DevOps tooling and mentored + hired engineers.

recentExperiences.stack: TypeScript, JavaScript, Python, NestJS, Nuxt, Vue, Rails, Kubernetes, EKS, Terraform, AWS (ECS, ECR, CloudFormation, EventBridge), Docker, GitHub Actions, OpenAI API, Tavily, PydanticAI

bullets: Containerized AI/ML models to Azure CUDA, adapted Jupyter Notebooks for production; built OAuth2 auth, MVP monorepo with Terraform & CI/CD; mentored engineers and led code reviews.
recentExperiences.stack: Azure, Docker, Vue.js, TypeScript, GraphQL, Apollo, PostgreSQL, Azure Functions, GitHub Actions

bullets: Implemented and refactored back-end services; profiled performance bottlenecks, drove data migrations, and improved containerization and dev-tool workflows.
recentExperiences.stack: Node.js, React, Redux, GraphQL, AWS, Docker, MongoDB, TeamCity

bullets: Managed front-end team (hiring, onboarding); modernized monolith to microservices, implemented code quality tooling, automated tests, A/B testing, and UI component library bridging UX and engineering.
recentExperiences.stack: React, GraphQL, Redux, AWS, Koa, MongoDB, WebPack, Magento

bullets: Full-stack JavaScript with unit, integration & E2E tests; microservices on AWS Lambda; integrated MongoDB, Stripe & SalesForce; monitored via Sentry and Heroku.

bullets: Led front-end for ASDA UK wholesale portal; designed architecture for recruiting startup.
